title: My New Diary!!!
entry:
OMG OMG OMG! Mommy gave me this diary today and it has GLITTER on the cover! I am soooo happy I could do a happy dance. I already did three happy dances actually hehe.

I showed it to Whiskers but she just yawned and walked away. Cats are so dramatic na! Buddy was more excited, he wagged his tail so fast. I think he wants his own diary too but dogs cant write silly!

I am going to write in this diary EVERY SINGLE DAY. Pinky promise to myself!
doodle_description: A sparkly diary with hearts floating around it and a smiling stick figure Emersyn jumping

title: Karate Belt Day
entry:
TODAY WAS THE BEST DAY EVERRR! I got my yellow belt in karate! Sensei said my kata was very good and I didnt even forget the moves this time. Last time I forgot and did a weird spin but today I was PERFECT.

Mommy and Papa were clapping so loud I felt like a superstar. After class we went to the mall and Papa bought me Frooti and popcorn chicken from the food court. I felt like a champion eating my victory snack!

Ava called me on Mommys phone and said she is so proud of me. She is the best best friend in the whole universe.
doodle_description: A yellow karate belt with a gold medal next to it and stars everywhere

title: Reel Day with Ava
entry:
Ava came to my house today and we made SO MANY reels! We did the new trending dance, the one with the hand movements. It took us like 100 tries but finally we got it perfect. My cheeks hurt from smiling so much.

We also did funny reels where we put silly filters on our faces. One filter made us look like puppies and Buddy got SO confused! He kept barking at the tablet hahaha. We laughed so hard we fell on the bed.

Mommy made us gol gappe for snack and Ava said my mom makes the BEST pani. Spicy wala! My eyes got watery but I still ate five.
doodle_description: Two girls dancing with music notes around them and a phone recording them

title: Lazy Sunday
entry:
Today I didnt do much. Just watched YouTube on the TV for a long time. I watched slime videos and then cooking videos and then funny cat videos. Whiskers sat on my lap the whole time, I think she likes watching TV too.

In the evening I played in the garden with Cotton. My bunny is so soft and fluffy like a cloud! I made her a little house with cardboard boxes but she just hopped away. Bunnies are funny.

Mommy made chai and I got to dip my biscuit in it. Only two dips because too much chai is not good for kids she said.
doodle_description: A fluffy bunny next to a cardboard house with a TV showing a cat video

title: Makeup Artist Emersyn
entry:
I did Mommys makeup today! Well she let me do a little bit. I put pink lipstick on her and purple eyeshadow. She looked SO pretty like a princess! Then she did my makeup too with my kid makeup kit.

I had pink cheeks and sparkly lips and I felt like a movie star. We took so many photos and I want to post them everywhere! Mommy said I can be a makeup artist when I grow up. Maybe I will have my own YouTube channel!

I also painted my nails rainbow colors. Every nail is different - pink, purple, blue, green, yellow! My hands look like a rainbow threw up on them hehe.
doodle_description: Lipstick, eyeshadow palette, nail polish bottles in rainbow colors and a mirror

title: School Project Disaster
entry:
Ugh today was NOT good. We had to do a group project with Leo and Mia and Leo was being SO slow. He kept reading the instructions again and again. I just wanted to start sticking things!

Then I accidentally spilled glitter EVERYWHERE. Teacher was not happy. Mia helped me clean up because she is nice like that. Leo just stood there looking scared like a little mouse.

But then Mia drew the most beautiful flowers on our poster and everyone said WOW. So I guess it was okay in the end. I still have glitter in my hair though.
doodle_description: A poster with flowers and glitter spilled everywhere with a sad face

title: Arcade Adventure!!!
entry:
PAPA TOOK ME TO THE GAME PARLOUR TODAY! I played the claw machine like ten times. I didnt win anything but it was still fun watching the claw go down. So close every time!

I played the racing game and the basketball throwing game and the one where you hit the moles. I got SO many tickets - 247 tickets! I counted them three times. I traded them for a sparkly bracelet and a small teddy bear.

My favorite was the dance game where you step on the arrows. A big kid was watching me and he said I was really good! I felt so cool. My legs are tired now but happy tired.
doodle_description: Arcade machines with tickets flying everywhere and a claw machine with toys inside

title: Diwali Shopping
entry:
Only two weeks until Diwali! Today we went to the mall for Diwali shopping and it was SO crowded but also SO exciting. There were lights everywhere and everything looked magical.

Mommy bought me a new lehenga - its pink and gold with so much work on it. I tried it on in the shop and did a twirl. The aunty at the shop said I looked like a little princess. I also got new juttis with mirrors on them!

We bought diyas and candles and rangoli colors too. I cant wait to make rangoli! Last year mine looked like a blob but this year I will make it perfect. Mia said she will help me.
doodle_description: A lehenga dress with sparkles, diyas with flames, and rangoli patterns

title: Cotton is Sick
entry:
I am very sad today. Cotton is not eating her food and she is just sitting in the corner not hopping. Mommy said we have to take her to the doctor tomorrow. I hope she is okay.

I sat next to her cage and sang her favorite song. I dont know if bunnies have favorite songs but I sang anyway. Buddy came and sat with me too like he knew I was sad. Dogs are so smart.

I said a little prayer for Cotton before sleeping. Please please please let her be okay. She is my fluffy baby.
doodle_description: A sad bunny in a cage with a worried stick figure Emersyn and hearts around the bunny

title: Cotton is Better!
entry:
YAY YAY YAY! The doctor said Cotton just had a tummy ache from eating too many treats. Oops that might be my fault because I gave her extra carrots. But she got medicine and now she is hopping again!

I was so happy I did a victory dance in the garden. Cotton watched me from her spot and I think she was happy too. Her little nose was wiggling so fast!

To celebrate I made a reel with all my pets. Whiskers, Buddy, and Cotton all in one video! It was hard to make them all look at the camera but we did it. Mommy said it was very cute.
doodle_description: A happy hopping bunny with medicine bottle and carrots with a big smile sun

title: Dance Class Fun
entry:
We learned a new dance in class today! Its a Bollywood dance for the Diwali show. The song is so catchy I cant stop humming it. The steps are hard but I practiced like 50 times.

Ava is also in my dance class and we are standing next to each other in the performance. We practiced the hand movements together during lunch break. Some boys were laughing at us but we ignored them because we are FABULOUS.

Teacher said I have very good expressions. I practiced my expressions in the mirror at home. Happy face, surprised face, shy face. Mommy said I was being dramatic but thats the point!
doodle_description: Two girls dancing in traditional clothes with musical notes and a stage

title: Amusement Park Day
entry:
BEST SUNDAY EVER! We went to the amusement park with Avas family! I went on the ferris wheel and I could see the WHOLE city from the top. It was scary but also amazing. Ava held my hand.

We went on bumper cars and I bumped into Papa so hard hahaha! Then we did merry-go-round which is my favorite because the horses are so pretty. I pretended I was a princess on a royal horse.

I ate cotton candy AND french fries AND popcorn. My tummy was so full but so happy. Ava and I won a goldfish in the carnival game! But Mommy said we cant keep it so we gave it to Avas family.
doodle_description: Ferris wheel, cotton candy, bumper cars, and two happy girls holding hands

title: Rangoli Practice
entry:
Mia came over to help me practice rangoli for Diwali. She is SO good at art, her rangoli looked like a real professional made it. Mine looked like... well... a colorful mess.

But Mia taught me a trick! She said to make dots first and then connect them. I tried again and it was much better! Still not as good as hers but Mommy said it was beautiful and she never lies. Okay sometimes she lies about vegetables being yummy but not about art.

We used all the colors - red, yellow, orange, green, blue. My fingers were rainbow colored after. I didnt want to wash my hands because they looked so pretty!
doodle_description: Colorful rangoli patterns with dots and flowers and colored powder containers

title: Boring Monday
entry:
School was SO boring today. We had maths and I dont like maths. Numbers make my brain hurt. Leo tried to help me but he explains things in a confusing way with too many words.

The only good part was lunch when Mommy packed gol gappe for me! Everyone was looking at my tiffin with jealous eyes. I shared one with Ava and one with Mia. Not with Leo because boys have cooties. Just kidding, I just didnt have enough.

After school I just watched YouTube and played with Whiskers. She let me put a tiny bow on her head for like 2 seconds before she shook it off. Cats have no fashion sense.
doodle_description: Math book with X eyes, a tiffin box with gol gappe, and a grumpy cat with a bow

title: Karate Kata Practice
entry:
Sensei taught us a new kata today and it has a KICK in it! I felt like a superhero doing the kick. Hi-ya! I practiced it so many times my leg got tired.

When I came home I showed Buddy my new moves. He got excited and started jumping around me. I think he thought we were playing. Silly doggy! Then I showed Whiskers but she just walked away. She is not impressed by anything.

I want to get my orange belt next. Sensei said I have to practice very hard. I WILL practice every day! Maybe I will become a karate champion and be in the Olympics!
doodle_description: A girl doing a karate kick with action lines and a belt collection showing yellow and orange

title: Fight with Ava
entry:
I am SO mad at Ava today. She said my dance steps were wrong but THEY WERE NOT! I know the steps, I practiced them a million times. She thinks she is always right but she is NOT.

I didnt talk to her during lunch. I sat with Mia instead. Mia said we should make up because best friends fight sometimes. But I am still angry. My face was angry all day.

Before sleeping I felt a little sad though. Ava is my best friend and I dont like being angry at her. Maybe I will talk to her tomorrow. Maybe.
doodle_description: Two girls facing away from each other with a broken heart between them and storm clouds

title: Made Up with Ava
entry:
Ava said sorry today! She brought me a candy and said she didnt mean to hurt my feelings. I said sorry too because maybe I was also a little mean. We hugged and everything is okay now!

We made a pinky promise to never fight again. Best friends forever and ever! We even made a friendship reel with a heart filter. It got 50 likes already!

Mommy said she was proud of me for making up. She gave me extra Frooti with dinner. Fighting is bad but making up feels SO good. My heart is happy again.
doodle_description: Two girls hugging with a rainbow and hearts everywhere and a pinky promise

title: Diwali Eve
entry:
TOMORROW IS DIWALI! I am so excited I cant even sleep! We cleaned the whole house today and decorated everything with lights. Our house looks like a fairy palace!

I helped Mommy make the rangoli at the entrance. I did the flower part and she did the diya part. It looks SO beautiful! I took like 20 photos of it. Daddy put up all the lights and the whole street is glowing.

Mommy is making sweets in the kitchen and the house smells amazing. I tried to sneak a ladoo but she caught me. She let me have just one small bite. Tomorrow I can eat as many as I want!
doodle_description: A house covered in fairy lights with rangoli at the door and fireworks in the sky

title: HAPPY DIWALI!!!
entry:
BEST DAY OF THE YEAR! I wore my new pink and gold lehenga and everyone said I looked like a princess. I felt like a princess too! My juttis were so sparkly.

We did puja in the morning and I got to ring the bell. Then we lit all the diyas and the whole house was glowing golden. At night we did sparklers and I wrote my name in the air with light! Papa helped me with the big fireworks.

So many people came to our house and I got money in envelopes! I ate so many sweets - gulab jamun, ladoo, barfi, everything! My tummy is SO full. This was the best Diwali ever!
doodle_description: Diyas, fireworks, sweets, money envelopes, and a girl in lehenga dancing

title: Post-Diwali Tired
entry:
I am SO tired today. Too much celebration yesterday! I slept until 10am and Mommy didnt even wake me up. She said I needed rest after all that dancing and eating.

I spent the whole day in my pajamas watching YouTube. Buddy slept next to me on the couch. We were both being lazy together. Whiskers was also sleeping on her favorite chair. Even Cotton was extra sleepy.

There are still leftover sweets and I had ladoo for breakfast. Mommy said thats not healthy but its Diwali week so rules are different. I love Diwali week rules!
doodle_description: A girl in pajamas on a couch with sleeping pets all around and zzz symbols

title: Back to School
entry:
School started again after Diwali break. Everyone was showing off their new clothes and gifts. I showed my new bracelet from the arcade and my sparkly juttis. Ava got a new tablet and Leo got like 100 books. Of course he did.

Teacher asked us to write about our Diwali. I wrote three whole pages! I wrote about the rangoli and the sweets and the fireworks. Teacher said my writing was very descriptive. I dont know what that means but it sounds good.

Mia drew a beautiful Diwali picture and teacher put it on the board. I wish I could draw like her. Maybe she can teach me someday.
doodle_description: A notebook with writing, a bracelet, and sparkly shoes with a gold star sticker

title: Cooking with Mommy
entry:
Today Mommy taught me how to make gol gappe filling! I got to mash the potatoes and add all the spices. It was so fun getting my hands all messy. The best part was tasting to check if it was yummy. I tasted like 10 times hehe.

Making the pani was hard because Mommy puts so many things in it. Mint and coriander and tamarind and spices. My eyes got watery from the smell but I was brave. Mommy said I am her little helper chef.

We ate the gol gappe for evening snack. I made them! Well, Mommy helped a lot but I helped too! They were SO yummy. Papa said they were the best gol gappe ever.
doodle_description: Gol gappe on a plate with pani bowl and a chef hat on a happy girl

title: Nail Art Day
entry:
Ava came over and we did nail art! I painted her nails pink with white dots and she painted mine purple with tiny stars. It took SO long because we kept messing up and starting again.

We also tried to paint Whiskers nails but she ran away SO fast. Mommy said we should not paint cat nails anyway. Oops. We painted a rock instead and pretended it was a pet rock named Sparkle.

After nails we made reels showing off our nail art. We did that thing where you move your hands around and show the nails. Very professional. We felt like real nail artists!
doodle_description: Hands with colorful nail art, nail polish bottles, and a painted rock with a face

title: Garden Discovery
entry:
I found a caterpillar in the garden today! It was green and fuzzy and SO cute. I named him Fuzzy and made him a little house in a jar with leaves. Mommy said he will become a butterfly someday!

I showed Fuzzy to Cotton but she just wiggled her nose. I showed him to Buddy and he tried to lick the jar. Dogs are so silly. Whiskers didnt care at all, she was busy chasing a butterfly. Maybe thats Fuzzys cousin!

I watched Fuzzy eat a leaf. It took him SO long to eat such a tiny piece. I would be so hungry if I ate that slow. I hope he becomes a beautiful butterfly soon!
doodle_description: A fuzzy caterpillar on a leaf with a jar house and a future butterfly with question mark

title: Mall Day
entry:
Sunday mall trip! My favorite thing ever! We went up and down the escalator like 5 times. Mommy said I was being silly but the escalator is SO fun. Its like a magic moving stairs!

We did window shopping and I saw SO many pretty things I want. A unicorn backpack, sparkly shoes, a dress with butterflies. Mommy said maybe for my birthday. My birthday is far away though!

Best part was the food court. I had french fries and Frooti and then we shared a cotton candy. The cotton candy was pink and it melted on my tongue like magic. I love mall days SO much!
doodle_description: An escalator with a happy girl, shopping bags, french fries, and cotton candy

title: Diwali Dance Show
entry:
THE DANCE SHOW WAS TODAY! I was so nervous my tummy felt funny. But when the music started I remembered all the steps! Ava and I danced perfectly together. We didnt mess up even once!

Mommy and Papa were in the audience clapping SO loud. I could hear them even with the music. After the show everyone said we were amazing. Teacher gave us all certificates!

Ava and I took so many photos in our costumes. We looked like real Bollywood dancers! This was the best performance of my whole life. I want to do it again and again!
doodle_description: Two girls in dance costumes on a stage with spotlights and clapping hands

title: Sick Day
entry:
I am sick today. My throat hurts and my nose is runny. No school for me. I should be happy about no school but being sick is NOT fun at all.

Mommy made me soup and gave me yucky medicine. Why does medicine taste so bad? I had to drink Frooti after to get the taste out. I watched YouTube all day but even that got boring after a while.

Whiskers slept on my bed with me. I think she knows I am sick. Buddy kept bringing me his toys like he wanted to make me feel better. My pets are the best nurses ever.
doodle_description: A girl in bed with tissues, medicine bottle, soup bowl, and pets around her

title: Feeling Better
entry:
I feel much better today! My throat doesnt hurt anymore. Mommy said I can go to school tomorrow. I actually missed school a little bit. Dont tell anyone I said that!

Ava video called me and showed me what I missed. Not much, just boring maths. She also showed me a funny reel and we laughed so hard. Laughing made me feel even better!

I played in the garden for a little bit. Not too much because Mommy said I need to rest more. I checked on Fuzzy the caterpillar and he is getting bigger! Soon he will be a butterfly!
doodle_description: A smiling sun, a girl doing a happy dance, and a bigger caterpillar

title: Leo's Birthday Party
entry:
Today was Leos birthday party! I didnt know shy Leo could have such a fun party. There were SO many books as decorations because Leo loves books. There was also a magic show!

The magician made a bunny appear from a hat! It reminded me of Cotton. I wanted to take the bunny home but Mommy said no, we already have Cotton. The cake was chocolate and shaped like a book. So yummy!

I gave Leo a bookmark I made with Mias help. It had stars and glitter. He smiled SO big, I never saw Leo smile that big before. Even shy kids like presents I guess!
doodle_description: A book-shaped cake, a magician with a bunny, and a glittery bookmark

title: One Month of Diary!
entry:
I cant believe I wrote in my diary for 30 days! Mommy said she is SO proud of me for not giving up. I am proud of me too! This diary has all my memories inside now.

So much happened this month - Diwali, dance show, karate belt, arcade trips, making up with Ava, Fuzzy the caterpillar, and so many fun days! Reading back makes me smile. Some days were hard but most days were happy.

I am going to keep writing forever and ever. When I am old like Mommy I will read this and remember being 6 years old. Future Emersyn, I hope you are happy and still love dancing and gol gappe!
doodle_description: A diary with a heart lock, number 30 with stars, and a girl hugging the diary
